subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you! It was good crossing paths at the conference, and I'd definitely like to continue that conversation.

Next week works for a 30-minute call. Could you share a couple of preferred time slots and your timezone? I'll confirm a slot that works on our end.

On the direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not in a position to share those directly. Once we've had our initial discussion and identified areas of alignment, I can help coordinate a senior-level technical introduction through the right channels.

Thanks for following up, and talk soon!

Best regards
